title: The Straw Hats Break Through Totto Land
description: On pages 3–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Carrot, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Big Mom as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My name... is Pedro...!! Please, lend us your aid.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Please attend to them immediately!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The whole world is waiting for them...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Those two alone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...must not be allowed to die....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Carrot
dialogue.text: I see. Pedro is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: dead, then...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...your resting place... Wasn't supposed to be here, was it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This happened because he came to rescue me...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's alright!! It's fine, Sanji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was Pedro's own decision to come here!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Please don't feel responsible, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You guys saved the mokomo Dukedom...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So he came here to repay the favour!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If Pedro hadn't been there at that moment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We would all have died!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So, please....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just tell him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: "THANK YOU" INSTEAD...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It's fine how things ended up....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The type of man he was...

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: soul Pocus

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Soul Pocus

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The souls speak [] This.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ship is pulled by the tides of the ocean and the wind in the air...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As if being pulled by the back of your hair...

dialogue.speaker: Perospero
dialogue.text: Cotton Candy Snow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: leaving a sea of stiff back there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does this mean we're almost out of the territory?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Mama is back up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Although, it's sure to not be sweet,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The singing flowers and trees will be upbeat,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As they lure you in ever so sweetly, soul. ) Pocus

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Set up by Mama Oh so greedy ♥

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It'll be an almighty show.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey! How'd it go!? What happened to straw hat?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A fairy tale prince and a beautiful princess; letting go.

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 38 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
